content: i am perhaps biased as i have not tried other similar apps but i very much like how this one presents the options available to you

everything but the introduction is paywalled i do not need an app to notice what affects mood downloaded for the mental health resources but will use something that offers a chance to text the benefits before charging
it is good app but you cannot change te language
im going to try this out because i hear voices in person and sometimes they can be mean or insulting
no depth just cheep commercial like advice but u may have a different openion so try it and see ur self

i started using this app back in when it was still called moodpath this app helped me understand my symptoms and patterns making it easier to navigate my mental health day to day because i used it consistently i never came to therapy or doctor appointments with a blank mind i used the notes from the app to guide discussions and my doctor even said it made working with me easier a simple but powerful tool that truly supports professional care

this app is great and its completely free you check in with your mood and answer a handful of questions a few times a day all private of course you can look at any of the material there is a course you can follow depending on what you feel you need like if you are exhausted or if you want to increase strength mentally and physically etc highly recommended
so far i love this app comprehensive insight accurate and helpful information and more in a well put together application nice work yall
so far it has helped me with stress so it really has been helpful i just dont want some halfdone therapy approach do far so good
literally just got the app and now im starting to get better
installed to see if information is correct current valid reliable usable thx
cool app i think its going to be worth the money

very informative and embarks one on a journey of self revelations also along the way equipping someone with factual references of information insight about their various personal issues we all endure as commonalities this in turn instills someones positivity about innate ability for growth of selfconfidence and resolve should one go up the road to self acceptance of human conditions to explore trending therapeutic non pharmaceutical treatments lastly unto psychologypsychiatric advice

useful better than a lot of other apps i recommend it but i removed star as info on the methodology of calculating the results is not sufficiently apparent how is it done and how robustly has it been tested

its a really great app unfortunately it shares device ids with third parties according to play which is not optional and does not work offline i like the idea but tracking is an absolute no go with apps that handle data this sensitive
im a new user but definitely enjoying the features
im sure this app is great but its mostly locked and for paid members i couldnt get much out of it without paying could potentially be used as a mood tracker but not much else
amazing app satisfied

i can not afford this app however it looks fantastic ill see if my dr will help if not ill just have to stick to free or cheaper ones dr said hed help pay but this ones quite expensive so i really dont know looks helpful though

so far ive found this app really helpful although when it asks about thoughts to end your life it pops up with a chat that asks if you want to be connected to an anonymous lifeline or a friendfamily member the lifeline is a telephone number to call which is inaccessible for many deafhoh people for example or for me its because i struggle with verbal shutdowns due to autism perhaps offering the shout text service number as well would be a good option to remedy this

really helpful edit well now i have been using this app for two weeks and damn i never thought it would be this perfect literally this is the best app i have ever downloaded in my entire life no this really helps and made me seriously consider the therapist step and made me pay attention to myself when i responded to a question about having suicidal thoughts there was no underestimation of the matter now i sent the therapy a rebort based on the application and it is realistic
its nice to use
total wichtige app ich empfehle sie

just a money grab like the rest of them if u dont pay your wasting your time as i have been for the last years there are way better ones out theere times better that dont require to be fit into our tight budgets its just too bad adios amigos good luck with your journeys

i had a very disappointing experience as a mood tracker it is too basic compared with a multitude of other apps its usp it asks you questions times a day for weeks at the end you are told you need to consult a therapist which surprise surprise minddoc can recommend one at per week it is utterly useless for me being unable to afford this and also in the uk an app designed to exploit peoples mental health fears for money
good pace good match for content x daily check in to track mood
right away requires a user account be created and the mandatory terms include you have to agree to the sharing of your personal and health information not for me

puts results behind a paywall after using for days thus making it useless

seems like my own psychiatrist i kinda like it

ok so whats hard is knowing im not ok no fault of mine and the price of healing is far more than i can afford expecially as i lost my job again due to the trauma inflicted upon me as a child i need to over come this but the tools and resources are only available if im a productive member of society and i cant learn and heal and work if only i could qualify for some kind of special service or a discount thank you for what i can use i appreciate your app and the efforts it took to launch
they charged me for minutes when i had consultation minutes i visited the psychologist and explained my situation and she said she couldnt help and i had to pay euro for that

i love the app works like magic and helps me concentrate more on my feelings with the good questions

i coincidentally downloaded minddoc right before beginning my therapy journey years ago it has been very cool to see it develop and grow over time ive never used the extras much im a data person so ive always been very consistent with the checkins every so often i take the results to therapy to show off how things have changed and that has been so rewarding this app didnt make those changes happen but it helped me notice trends and patterns to help myself make them happen
great free mood tracker with actually helpful questions i havent tried the paid version bc the free version does what i needed

i really like this app its great for mood tracking and helpful in practicing selfawarenessrecognizing your patterns and behaviors if you are on top of logging into the app every morning noon and night for like a week or two youll get your results so fast and even after you get results they still track for more i also like the many varietal questions some are a bit personal but thats what makes the app real i think that there should be more check in emotions like fear or jealousy
no unsolicited unwanted unwarranted advice from people who dont even know you its great
the question do you feel sad or down needs a third answerlike i dont knowhow i feel

its a really good app it has an easy database and stores questions and has them relatively easy to answer i redownloaded the app as i joticied my mental health was going it is a great tool and i highly suggest it especially if you almost always have your device with you i like to take like five minutes each question period to do that and some relaxing thing to just ground myself

truly ive never encountered an application as fascinating as this one i deeply appreciate the creators who conceived such useful applications and decided to assist those in need even though i cant participate in the paid version im genuinely content with the free version if there were more than stars id gladly give them all to you

your app does not take disabled people into account and they disproportionately suffer from mental illness many questions are geared towards work which i am unable to do ive also been asked if im afraid of becoming seriously ill im already seriously ill you assume that everyone using this app is physically well and able to work it is erasure of disabled people please consider consulting with people from the disabled community on how to include us
this has honestly helped me want to achieve my objectives and be better i appreciate this app so much i needed it

i didnt expect this app to be as good as it is its helped me navigate through the aftermath of my panic disorder and gave me helpful tools for the future the questions being asked times a day can be overwhelming at times but what ive found is that if youre busy or need to take a break from it the app recognizes that and stops sending notifications after being ignored for a few days i ended up buying the annual subscription and have recommended it to many of my friends and loved ones
i like the questions throughout the day it makes me stop and recenter to see how im feeling

i may change my rating after i see my first evaluation so far im not impressed im seeing a lot of uninsightful insights paywalled insights and some informational pieces with no new information also minddoc appears to have forgotten the first rule of paywalls you have to put something outside the paywall that gives some confidence that theres something worth paying for inside so far not seeing it update i got my first report guess what it didnt tell me anything i didnt know
brings out interesting points but the fee rates are more then i can afford but the free version is helpful

this program gives me an outlet to express my thoughts and feelings that others do not being unemployed for nearly two years and no money coming in ive been using the free version i dont know if anyone is monitoring what i post within the application put i can release some of my negative feelings and thoughts within it the weeklymonthly fees subscription are way more then i can afford

i really find this app helpful thank you developers there is also an option in the profile portion of the app that gives you direct access to a counseling service and helpline if you need it of course i just hid the button by accident and would love to restore it still i would definitely recomend the app to those individuals looking to build their cognitive therapy and health support system
